columns.name: apt_number
columns.description: Apartment number associated with the booking.

columns.name: booking_end_date
columns.description: Exact booking end timestamp. Preserve the complete date and time exactly as stated, including hour, minute, and seconds when present; do not truncate to date-only or round seconds.

columns.name: booking_start_date
columns.description: Exact booking start timestamp. Preserve the complete date and time exactly as stated, including hour, minute, and seconds when present; do not truncate to date-only or round seconds.

columns.name: booking_status_code
columns.description: Status code indicating the booking status (e.g., provisional, confirmed).

columns.name: guest_first_name
columns.description: First name of the guest who made the booking.

columns.name: guest_last_name
columns.description: Last name of the guest who made the booking.

columns.name: building_address
columns.description: Full physical address of the apartment building. Include street number, street name, city, state, and ZIP/postal code exactly as stated; do not omit the postal code or city/state.

columns.name: building_description
columns.description: Description of the apartment building, such as the type of units it offers.

columns.name: building_full_name
columns.description: Full official name of the apartment building.

columns.name: building_manager
columns.description: Name of the manager responsible for the apartment building.

columns.name: building_phone
columns.description: Contact phone number for the apartment building or its manager.

columns.name: apt_number
columns.description: Apartment number where the facility is provided.

columns.name: facility_code
columns.description: Name or code identifying a facility available in the apartment.

columns.name: apt_number
columns.description: Unique number identifying the apartment.

columns.name: apt_type_code
columns.description: Code representing the type of apartment (e.g., Studio, One-bedroom).

columns.name: bathroom_count
columns.description: Number of bathrooms in the apartment.

columns.name: bedroom_count
columns.description: Number of bedrooms in the apartment.

columns.name: building_full_name
columns.description: Full name of the building the apartment belongs to.

columns.name: room_count
columns.description: Total number of rooms in the apartment.

columns.name: date_of_birth
columns.description: Exact guest birth date or timestamp as stated. Preserve all provided date and time precision; do not invent or remove seconds.

columns.name: gender_code
columns.description: Gender of the guest.

columns.name: guest_first_name
columns.description: First name of the guest.

columns.name: guest_last_name
columns.description: Last name of the guest.

columns.name: apt_number
columns.description: Apartment number being tracked for availability.

columns.name: available_yn
columns.description: Indicates whether the apartment is available (1 for Yes, 0 for No).

columns.name: booking_end_date
columns.description: Exact booking end timestamp associated with the unit status. Preserve all provided time precision, including seconds.

columns.name: booking_start_date
columns.description: Exact booking start timestamp associated with the unit status. Preserve all provided time precision, including seconds.

columns.name: status_date
columns.description: Exact status timestamp for the unit. Preserve the full date and time, including seconds when present; do not output date-only if time is stated.
